title: attrimotif: An attributed directed bipartite motif inference workflow in Python
description: A dependency-light Python workflow for attributed directed bipartite networks: a node-attributed bipartite motif census, node-category stratification and the attribute operator Phi, a degree-preserving null with a null-identifiability diagnostic, and panel-level Portrait Divergence with a permutation test. The package ships only synthetic generators and reads user-supplied or public-download data; no proprietary data are included or required.
